'''chayatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jocko|jocko]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jocko|jocko]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chayatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæyæthæth|chæyæthæth]] || [[word:chæyæthæj|chæyæthæj]] || [[word:chæyæthæsh|chæyæthæsh]] || [[word:chæyæthæ|chæyæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chayayathath|chayayathath]] || [[word:chayayathaj|chayayathaj]] || [[word:chayayathash|chayayathash]] || [[word:chayayatha|chayayatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chayathath|chayathath]] || [[word:chayathaj|chayathaj]] || [[word:chayathash|chayathash]] || [[word:chayatha|chayatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chayafthath|chayafthath]] || [[word:chayafthaj|chayafthaj]] || [[word:chayafthash|chayafthash]] || [[word:chayafthaf|chayafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chayathatha|chayathatha]] || [[word:chayathaja|chayathaja]] || [[word:chayathasha|chayathasha]] || [[word:chayathaka|chayathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chayathath|chayathath]] || [[word:chayathaj|chayathaj]] || [[word:chayathash|chayathash]] || [[word:chayatha|chayatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chayathathal|chayathathal]] || [[word:chayathajal|chayathajal]] || [[word:chayathashal|chayathashal]] || [[word:chayathakal|chayathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chayathathatha|chayathathatha]] || [[word:chayathajaja|chayathajaja]] || [[word:chayathashasha|chayathashasha]] || [[word:chayathaka|chayathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chayathathan|chayathathan]] || [[word:chayathajan|chayathajan]] || [[word:chayathashan|chayathashan]] || [[word:chayathakan|chayathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chayathathaoro|chayathathaoro]] || [[word:chayathajaoro|chayathajaoro]] || [[word:chayathashaoro|chayathashaoro]] || [[word:chayathakaoro|chayathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
